title: Clock HUD Renew
description: Show a clock on the screen!
body:
# ClockHUD
### A mod show a clock bar in your game

*This is a reload version for [ClockHUD](https://github.com/samvbeckmann/ClockHUD), but work with fabric in high version and fully rewrite code.*

### Language Support
- English
- 简体中文
- [Create a pull request](https://github.com/KawaiiZapic/ClockHUD/pulls) for new langauge!

### Requirements
1. Fabric
2. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

### Key bindings

- `F10` Toggle HUD on / off
- `Home` Open ClockHUD Config

### ScreenShot
